rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft,

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: The judge appointed by another tribe who wanted to observe Sabbath at a church built for Mary
A copy of the Miracles of Mary belonging to a righteous monk is lost; rain does not fall for seventeen days and nights during the rainy season until the manuscript is found
How the Archangel rescued the people whose boat was troubled by high wind
The farmer who could not perform a fast in honor of the Archangel because of drought and famine.
The farmer who neglected to make the feast of the Archangel
The man from whom an evil spirit was cast out during the Mass service
